role: Primary 12-class YOLO lead detector artifact used for page-level lead localization.
notes: Survives into the final compact pipeline and the modular notebook. Aliases normalized under `best.pt`: best.pt.

role: Earliest baseline segmentation checkpoint from the synthetic-only stage.
notes: Main notebook saves `best_model.pth`; later notebooks usually refer to a `.pt` variant or successor checkpoints instead. Aliases normalized under `best_model`: best_model.pth, best_model.pt.

role: Early real-data adaptation checkpoint bridging synthetic pretraining and later phase-labeled fine-tuning.
notes: Referenced across early research notebooks and reused as historical context inside notebook (42). Aliases normalized under `best_model_real_data`: best_model_real_data.pt, best_model_real_data.pth.

role: Intermediate hardening-era segmentation checkpoint used in geometry and quality-boost experiments.
notes: Important as a bridge checkpoint, but not part of the final likely architecture. Aliases normalized under `best_model_phase2`: best_model_phase2.pt, best_model_phase2.pth.

role: Architecture-hardening checkpoint from the phase-7 branch.
notes: Only lightly evidenced in the audited corpus. Aliases normalized under `best_model_phase7`: best_model_phase7.pt, best_model_phase7.pth.

role: Optimization-retuned checkpoint from the phase-8 branch.
notes: Appears mainly as a handoff checkpoint before phase-10 fine-tuning takes over. Aliases normalized under `best_model_phase8`: best_model_phase8.pt, best_model_phase8.pth.

role: Late pre-phase-10 segmentation checkpoint retained as an alternate or predecessor reference.
notes: Acts more as lineage evidence than as a clearly surviving deployed artifact. Aliases normalized under `best_model_phase9`: best_model_phase9.pt, best_model_phase9.pth.

role: Dominant phase-10 segmentation checkpoint from the real-image pseudo-label fine-tuning era.
notes: Remains a core fallback or comparison model even after the EffB3 branch becomes first-class. Aliases normalized under `best_model_phase10`: best_model_phase10.pt, best_model_phase10.pth.

role: DeepLabV3+ competitor branch checkpoint family created in the notebook (42) ensemble era.
notes: Important competitor artifact, but Phase 1 evidence does not show it becoming the default final deployment path. Aliases normalized under `best_model_deeplab_ph10`: best_model_deeplab_ph10.pt, best_model_deeplab_ph10.pth, temp_deeplab_base.pt.

role: EfficientNet competitor branch created during notebook (42) before the later dedicated EffB3 deployment lineage.
notes: Serves as important evidence that EfficientNet-style encoders were being tested before the final EffB3 rollout. Aliases normalized under `best_model_efficientnet_ph10`: best_model_efficientnet_ph10.pt, best_model_efficientnet_ph10.pth, temp_effnet_base.pt.

role: Primary EfficientNet-B3 deployment checkpoint promoted into the late compact notebooks.
notes: Likely becomes the preferred primary segmentation branch in notebooks (49) through (56). Aliases normalized under `best_model_effb3_phase9_ddp`: best_model_effb3_phase9_ddp (2).pth, best_model_effb3_phase9_ddp.pt.

role: Full resumable training-state checkpoint for the EffB3 DDP branch.
notes: Not referenced directly by notebooks in the bundle, but crucial for understanding the maturity of the EffB3 branch. Aliases normalized under `checkpoint_effb3_phase9_ddp_training_state`: checkpoint_effb3_phase9_ddp (1) (1).pt.

role: Generic Ultralytics pretrained detector checkpoint used as a starting point for detector experiments.
notes: Acts as upstream initialization rather than a project-specific final artifact. Aliases normalized under `yolov8n-pretrained`: yolov8n.pt.

role: Larger pretrained YOLO variant used in detector experimentation.
notes: Used to test detector scale choices before settling on project-specific detector artifacts. Aliases normalized under `yolov8l-pretrained`: yolov8l.pt.

role: Medium pretrained YOLO variant used in detector experimentation.
notes: Appears as an alternative detector initialization rather than a persistent project artifact. Aliases normalized under `yolov8m-pretrained`: yolov8m.pt.

role: Large pretrained YOLO variant used in the combat detector branch and notebook (42) experiments.
notes: Important as detector training provenance, not as the final deployed detector. Aliases normalized under `yolov8x-pretrained`: yolov8x.pt.
